operation.add:
<script type="text/javascript"><!--
            dataLayer.push({
              "ecommerce": {
                "currencyCode": "{{ currency_code }}",
                "detail": {
                  "products": [
                    {
                      "id": "{{ metrica_product_id }}",
                      "name" : "{{ metrica_product_name }}",
                      "price": {{ metrica_product_price }},
                      "brand": "{{ metrica_product_manufacturer }}",
                      "category": "{{ metrica_product_category }}"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              }
            });
          //--></script>

<script type="text/javascript"><!--
            dataLayer.push({
              "ecommerce": {
                "currencyCode": "<?php echo $currency_code; ?>",
                "detail": {
                  "products": [
                    {
                      "id": "<?php echo $metrica_product_id; ?>",
                      "name" : "<?php echo $metrica_product_name; ?>",
                      "price": <?php echo $metrica_product_price; ?>,
                      "brand": "<?php echo $metrica_product_manufacturer; ?>",
                      "category": "<?php echo $metrica_product_category; ?>"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              }
            });
          //--></script>

<script type="text/javascript">
            let form = document.querySelector('#content > form');
            form.onsubmit = function(evt) {
              evt.preventDefault();
              let quantity_old;
              let quantity_new;
              let key;

              $('#content > form').find('input').each(function() {
                quantity_new = $(this).val();
                quantity_old = $(this).attr('value');
                key = $(this).attr('name').match(/\d+/g)[0];

                var difference_in_quantity = quantity_old - quantity_new;

                if (difference_in_quantity < 0) {
                  sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
                    id: key,
                    event: 'add',
                    id_type: 'key',
                    quantity: Math.abs(difference_in_quantity),
                    async: false
                  });
                  setTimeout(function() {
                    form.submit();
                  }, 1000);
                } else if (difference_in_quantity > 0) {
                  sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
                    id: key,
                    event: 'remove',
                    id_type: 'key',
                    quantity: Math.abs(difference_in_quantity),
                    async: false
                  });
                  setTimeout(function() {
                    form.submit();
                  }, 1000);
                }
              });
            };
          </script>

<script type="text/javascript">
            let form = document.querySelector('#content > form');
            form.onsubmit = function(evt) {
              evt.preventDefault();
              let quantity_old;
              let quantity_new;
              let key;

              $('#content > form').find('input').each(function() {
                quantity_new = $(this).val();
                quantity_old = $(this).attr('value');
                key = $(this).attr('name').match(/\d+/g)[0];

                var difference_in_quantity = quantity_old - quantity_new;

                if (difference_in_quantity < 0) {
                  sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
                    id: key,
                    event: 'add',
                    id_type: 'key',
                    quantity: Math.abs(difference_in_quantity),
                    async: false
                  });
                  setTimeout(function() {
                    form.submit();
                  }, 1000);
                } else if (difference_in_quantity > 0) {
                  sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
                    id: key,
                    event: 'remove',
                    id_type: 'key',
                    quantity: Math.abs(difference_in_quantity),
                    async: false
                  });
                  setTimeout(function() {
                    form.submit();
                  }, 1000);
                }
              });
            };
          </script>

<script type="text/javascript">
            function sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica(options) {
              let id = options.id; // required
              let event = options.event; // required
              let id_type = (typeof(options.id_type) != 'undefined' ? options.id_type : 'product_id');
              let quantity = (typeof(options.quantity) != 'undefined' ? options.quantity : 'null');
              let async = (typeof(options.async) != 'undefined' ? options.async : true);

              $.ajax({
                url: 'index.php?route=product/product/getProductDataForYandexMetrica',
                async: (typeof(async) != 'undefined' ? async : true),
                type: 'post',
                data: 'id=' + id + '&event=' + event + '&id_type=' + id_type + '&quantity=' + quantity,
                dataType: 'json',
                success: function(json) {
                  if (event == 'add') {
                    dataLayer.push({"ecommerce": {"currencyCode": json['currency_code'], "add": {"products": [json['product']]}}});
                  } else if (event == 'remove') {
                    dataLayer.push({"ecommerce": {"currencyCode": json['currency_code'], "remove": {"products": [json['product']]}}});
                  }
                },
                error: function(xhr, ajaxOptions, thrownError) {
                  alert(thrownError + "\r\n" + xhr.statusText + "\r\n" + xhr.responseText);
                }
              });
            }

            cart['add_original'] = cart['add'];
            cart['add'] = function(product_id, quantity) {
              sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
                id: product_id,
                event: 'add',
                id_type: 'product_id',
                quantity: quantity
              });
              cart.add_original(product_id, quantity);
            };

            cart['remove_original'] = cart['remove'];
            cart['remove'] = function(key) {
              sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
                id: key,
                event: 'remove',
                id_type: 'key',
                async: false
              });
              setTimeout(function() {
                cart.remove_original(key);
              }, 500);
            };
          </script>

<?php if (isset($metrica_order_id)) { ?>
            <script type="text/javascript">
              dataLayer.push({
                "ecommerce": {
                  "currencyCode": "<?php echo $currency_code; ?>",
                  "purchase": {
                    "actionField": {
                      "id" : "<?php echo $metrica_order_id; ?>",
                      <?php if (isset($metrica_coupon)) { ?>
                      "coupon": "<?php echo $metrica_coupon; ?>",
                      <?php } ?> 
                      "revenue": "<?php echo $metrica_total; ?>"
                    },
                    "products": [
                      <?php foreach ($metrica_order_products as $product) { ?>
                      {
                        "id": "<?php echo $product["metrica_product_id"]; ?>",
                        "name": "<?php echo $product["metrica_product_name"]; ?>",
                        "price": <?php echo $product["metrica_product_price"]; ?>,
                        "brand": "<?php echo $product["metrica_product_manufacturer"]; ?>",
                        "category": "<?php echo $product["metrica_product_category"]; ?>",
                        "quantity": <?php echo $product["metrica_product_quantity"]; ?>
                      },
                      <?php } ?> 
                    ]
                  }
                }
              });
            </script>
          <?php } ?>

<script>
          function getProductQuantities() {
              const productQuantities = {};
              const rows = document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr');

              rows.forEach(row => {
                  const productLink = row.querySelector('td.name a[href*="product_id="]');

                  if (productLink) {
                      const href = productLink.getAttribute('href');
                      const productIdMatch = href.match(/product_id=(\d+)/);

                      if (productIdMatch) {
                          const productId = productIdMatch[1];
                          const quantityInput = row.querySelector('input[name^="quantity"]');
                          const quantity = quantityInput ? parseInt(quantityInput.value) : 0;

                          if (productQuantities[productId]) {
                              productQuantities[productId] += quantity;
                          } else {
                              productQuantities[productId] = quantity;
                          }
                      }
                  }
              });

              return Object.keys(productQuantities).map(productId => ({
                  product_id: productId,
                  value: productQuantities[productId].toString()
              }));
          }

          function compareProductQuantities(previousData, newData) {
              const previousMap = new Map();
              const newMap = new Map();

              previousData.forEach(item => {
                  previousMap.set(item.product_id, parseInt(item.value));
              });

              newData.forEach(item => {
                  newMap.set(item.product_id, parseInt(item.value));
              });

              previousData.forEach(item => {
                  const productId = item.product_id;
                  const previousQuantity = parseInt(item.value);

                  if (!newMap.has(productId)) {
                      sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
                          id: productId,
                          event: 'remove',
                          id_type: 'product_id',
                          quantity: previousQuantity
                      });
                  }
              });

              newData.forEach(item => {
                  const productId = item.product_id;
                  const newQuantity = parseInt(item.value);

                  if (previousMap.has(productId)) {
                      const previousQuantity = previousMap.get(productId);

                      if (newQuantity > previousQuantity) {
                          const difference = newQuantity - previousQuantity;
                          sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
                              id: productId,
                              event: 'add',
                              id_type: 'product_id',
                              quantity: difference
                          });
                      } else if (newQuantity < previousQuantity) {
                          const difference = previousQuantity - newQuantity;
                          sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
                              id: productId,
                              event: 'remove',
                              id_type: 'product_id',
                              quantity: difference
                          });
                      }
                  } else {
                      sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
                          id: productId,
                          event: 'add',
                          id_type: 'product_id',
                          quantity: newQuantity
                      });
                  }
              });
          }

          if ($('.simplecheckout-cart tbody tr').length === 1) {
              $(document).on('click', '[data-onclick="removeProduct"]', function() {
                  const row = $('.simplecheckout-cart tbody tr');
                  const productId = row.find('a[href*="product_id="]').attr('href')?.match(/product_id=(\d+)/)?.[1];
                  const quantity = row.find('input[name^="quantity"]').val();
                  
                  if (productId && quantity) {
                      sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
                          id: productId,
                          event: 'remove',
                          id_type: 'product_id',
                          quantity: quantity
                      });
                  }
              });
          }

          if (typeof productQuantities !== 'undefined' && Array.isArray(productQuantities) && productQuantities.length > 0) {
              previousProductQuantities = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(productQuantities));
          }
          productQuantities = getProductQuantities();
          if (typeof previousProductQuantities !== 'undefined' && typeof productQuantities !== 'undefined') {
              compareProductQuantities(previousProductQuantities, productQuantities);
          }
          </script>

<script>
          function getProductQuantities() {
              const productQuantities = {};
              const rows = document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr');

              rows.forEach(row => {
                  const productLink = row.querySelector('td.name a[href*="product_id="]');

                  if (productLink) {
                      const href = productLink.getAttribute('href');
                      const productIdMatch = href.match(/product_id=(\d+)/);

                      if (productIdMatch) {
                          const productId = productIdMatch[1];
                          const quantityInput = row.querySelector('input[name^="quantity"]');
                          const quantity = quantityInput ? parseInt(quantityInput.value) : 0;

                          if (productQuantities[productId]) {
                              productQuantities[productId] += quantity;
                          } else {
                              productQuantities[productId] = quantity;
                          }
                      }
                  }
              });

              return Object.keys(productQuantities).map(productId => ({
                  product_id: productId,
                  value: productQuantities[productId].toString()
              }));
          }

          function compareProductQuantities(previousData, newData) {
              const previousMap = new Map();
              const newMap = new Map();

              previousData.forEach(item => {
                  previousMap.set(item.product_id, parseInt(item.value));
              });

              newData.forEach(item => {
                  newMap.set(item.product_id, parseInt(item.value));
              });

              previousData.forEach(item => {
                  const productId = item.product_id;
                  const previousQuantity = parseInt(item.value);

                  if (!newMap.has(productId)) {
                      sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
                          id: productId,
                          event: 'remove',
                          id_type: 'product_id',
                          quantity: previousQuantity
                      });
                  }
              });

              newData.forEach(item => {
                  const productId = item.product_id;
                  const newQuantity = parseInt(item.value);

                  if (previousMap.has(productId)) {
                      const previousQuantity = previousMap.get(productId);

                      if (newQuantity > previousQuantity) {
                          const difference = newQuantity - previousQuantity;
                          sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
                              id: productId,
                              event: 'add',
                              id_type: 'product_id',
                              quantity: difference
                          });
                      } else if (newQuantity < previousQuantity) {
                          const difference = previousQuantity - newQuantity;
                          sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
                              id: productId,
                              event: 'remove',
                              id_type: 'product_id',
                              quantity: difference
                          });
                      }
                  } else {
                      sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
                          id: productId,
                          event: 'add',
                          id_type: 'product_id',
                          quantity: newQuantity
                      });
                  }
              });
          }

          if ($('.simplecheckout-cart tbody tr').length === 1) {
              $(document).on('click', '[data-onclick="removeProduct"]', function() {
                  const row = $('.simplecheckout-cart tbody tr');
                  const productId = row.find('a[href*="product_id="]').attr('href')?.match(/product_id=(\d+)/)?.[1];
                  const quantity = row.find('input[name^="quantity"]').val();
                  
                  if (productId && quantity) {
                      sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
                          id: productId,
                          event: 'remove',
                          id_type: 'product_id',
                          quantity: quantity
                      });
                  }
              });
          }

          if (typeof productQuantities !== 'undefined' && Array.isArray(productQuantities) && productQuantities.length > 0) {
              previousProductQuantities = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(productQuantities));
          }

          productQuantities = getProductQuantities();

          if (typeof previousProductQuantities !== 'undefined' && typeof productQuantities !== 'undefined') {
              compareProductQuantities(previousProductQuantities, productQuantities);
          }
          </script>
